_comment: Paste these into UiPath Agent Builder. Open the recon agent → Data Manager → Input schema tab → 'Edit raw schema' → paste `input`; then Output schema tab → 'Edit raw schema' → paste `output`. The output property names match exactly what SeamProof's seam-1/seam-2 contracts read from the agent.output span (vendor_id, amount, currency, line_items[].amount, confidence, exception_flagged).

invoice_text.description: The raw invoice document text to reconcile.

po.description: The purchase order this invoice should match.

receipt.description: The goods/services receipt for three-way matching.

vendor_id.description: The vendor identifier extracted from the invoice (e.g. V-1042).

amount.description: The invoice TOTAL exactly as printed on the document. Do not recompute it from the line items.

currency.description: ISO currency code of the invoice (e.g. USD).

line_items.description: Each invoice line item, listed separately.

confidence.description: Extraction confidence in [0,1]; lower it when the document is ambiguous or hard to read.

exception_flagged.description: true if you detect any discrepancy versus the PO or receipt (vendor, currency, totals, or missing receipt).
